title: Warpz' Wraith Mid
description:
> This guide has been converted, and some content may be missing. 
[View the full guide on pred.gg](https://pred.gg/guides/ezWYezl)

# Overview
This build focuses on high burst damage with an invisibility engage & great kill securing executes.

## Items
### 1. Mind Razor
This item is a must build for the first slot, Giving you your mana & wave clear for the whole game.
I recommend only building your **soul chalice**. then jumping immediately into item number two *VANQUISHER* after completion of *VANQUISHER* then complete *MINDRAZOR*

### 2. Vanquisher
I recommend Vanq second, as this will allow you to start securing kills in early game teamfights. This Item only gets stronger as the game goes on and healthpools increase, it becomes a fantastic execute.

### 3. Omen
This is a fantastic item number 3 as it combos amazingly with item 4 *ENVY* Boosting the damage of your first basic attack, and having that basic attack become a guaranteed Crit because of *ENVY'S* effect. Not only will the first basic do insane Dmg but it will also reduce cooldowns by 2 seconds allowing your invis to come online again much faster to combo again sooner.

### 4. Envy
This item is the bread and butter of the my preferred playstyle. Upon basic attacking an enemy while invis. the bonus dmg from *OMEN* will become a guaranteed Crit for huge Dmg. then the following combo Q -> RMB -> RMB you'll be dealing 10% bonus dmg. Killing any squishy almost instantly.

### 5. Perforator
This item is simply here for its great statline, and 30% Pen. Also the passive 10% slow paired with the slow you get from the **Q** will achieve a total slow of 45% making you're **RMB** much easier to hit.

## Playstyle
This specific build focuses on an extremely high burst Dmg combo after exiting invisibility.
The gameplay loop is as follows
1. go invis and safely get within basic attack range of opponent
2. Basic attack enemy taking advantage of the *OMEN* + *ENVY* Combo
3. Follow up immediately with the **Q** -> **RMB** -> **BASIC** -> **RMB** Combo
4. Finish kill if safe.
5. Finally use invis again and re-position
6. Rinse and repeat

## Notes
Use Ult to pull back fleeing Opponents or to peel for yourself / your carry
Use your crest *ORTUS* ANY time you're going to secure a kill. Alternatively if you need to run away. The *invis* + *ortus* combo can get you out of most sticky situations
Finally in teamfights try to take off-angles, and play like a ranged assassin.
author: Warpz

title: Wraith's Covid Vaccine
description:
> This guide has been converted, and some content may be missing. 
[View the full guide on pred.gg](https://pred.gg/guides/MorFAmp)

You will be the nurse and the enemy Morgesh is the American. Just like the broken healthcare system, you will poke the enemy like a doctor with the Covid vaccine. Much like a right wing radical, Morg will be screaming to resist, but baby it's mandatory.
  Now this build is used to dominate a squishy team. For a tank heavy team, you may want to look into the pen builds with malady and resolution. If up against a tank, of course use demo but with the nerfs, I don't think it is a must buy anymore (or at least hope not. Now that Infernum has been nerfed and Nuclear rounds got haste, that knock knock will be coming back quick and hitting hard. The increased ability damage works wonders with echo to heal you and Solaris (the new item) give wraith every stat he likes. Knock Knock now benefits from lifesteal!!!!!
  The ol' weaving auto's in-between his abilities was like it was born for Solaris. Solaris just got a buff and now heals as well as crits the On-Hit damage.

title: Wraith The Cyber Sniper
description:
> This guide has been converted, and some content may be missing. 
[View the full guide on pred.gg](https://pred.gg/guides/FWNKc3Y)

Hero Augment : Sniper's Bounty / Illusionist / Mystic Marksman
Minor Augment P1 : Voracity
Minor Augment P2 : Executioner / Alchemist

Build Soul Chalice (tier 2 item) from Resolution --> Malady --> Finish Resolution --> ...
Build based on physical power / pen / ability haste.
Combo : Surprise,Surprise -> Knock,Knock -> Auto Attack -> Knock,Knock -> Auto Attacks.
Use your Ult to secure kills when you think they'll blink or use an ability to escape. You can also use it to stay alive when they're diving you.
Use crest to engage or escape a fight.
Swap Ortus for Witchstalker if the enemy team has a lot of CC like Fey/Aurora/Steel.

Updated for 1.6

title: Wraith Guide, Everything you need to know
description:
> This guide has been converted, and some content may be missing. 
[View the full guide on pred.gg](https://pred.gg/guides/917sgcT)

# Quick Guide:
Skill Order: RMB>Q>E and take R When Available.
Combo: Q-RMB-LMB-RMB (2000+ damage late game)

- Wraith is a Ability based carry, that is very punishing if you can't land your shots. 
- one of the longest ranges out of all the carries with his RMB, Knock Knock. 
- he is worse into heavy tank compositions than other carries and he can struggle to 1v1 other carries in the mid game. He has no escapes so positioning is very important to not getting picked off in a teamfight or gank.
- Where he shines is incredible burst and pick potential with his ult. Insane combo damage in the late game and can farm very safely with your RMB 

# Ability Breakdown
 - Passive: Your ward(3) becomes a throwable drone that pulses to enemy's within 1000 units every 3 seconds then becoming a regular ward. At level 6 it can also reveal enemy wards.

 - RMB: a long range sniper shot that takes a small wind up time that pierces terrain and does the majority of your damage. killing any unit or hitting a target marked by your Q  reduces it's cooldown to 1 second and refunds the mana. This will be a main source of last hitting and wave pushing during laning phase.

 - Q: Throw an arching grenade that does a small amount of aoe damage and slows marking the targets hit doing 8% additional max health damage if hit by your RMB

 - E: After a short delay, enter Camouflage and gain 20.00% movement speed for 5s. Takedowns will reset the cooldown. The Passive gives you increased physical penetration. Closest thing you have to an escape, also a good gank tool for roams or coming back to lane. 

 - R: Your ult marks the location of enemy targeted and after 2.5 seconds they teleport back to that location. This can be used defensively to get away from an enemy chasing you getting teleported back and away, or aggressively by ulting a target running away to set up your combo or any teammates cc.

# Early game
 - Farm, Farm, Farm. make sure to get as many last hits as you can. With your RMB to easily secure last hits you should be able to be even or ahead of the other carry even if you have bad lane matchups. Staying alive to keep farming is key, your RMB is very mana intensive early so I wouldn't use it to poke unless you mark players with your Q first. Use your Passive to toss wards deep into jungle to catch ganks early since your pretty immobile.
 - On your first back you want to grab either soul chalice if the enemy adc's can't wave clear super fast (like a kira or grim) to start stacking faster or a barbaric cleaver against good wave clear adc's like twinblast or drongo to prevent having to farm under tower constantly, if you have the option.

# Mid Game
 - If you are ahead and take the duo lane tower, you want to extend that lead to other lanes, roaming using your E to gank, and taking towers and grabbing objectives with your jungler. If you are behind, you just want to keep farming and clearing waves without feeding any more kills until you get at least 3 items. Be careful about taking 1v1's unless you are very far ahead, wraith has weak consistent damage and your burst is not high enough to carry you most of the way to a kill at this stage of the game.

# Late Game
 - Once you build your demolisher, you become start to become a one shot beast. Look to stay alive and combo on squishy champs to one shot them in smaller skirmishes, even hitting the enemy frontline in full teamfights with the combo (Q>RMB>LMB>RMB) can chunk them and is easy to follow up for a kill and take them out of the fight. You want to keep lanes pushed up while staying safe so your team can take advantage of picks to take inhibitors with the longer death timers. At this point, your ult will have a pretty long targeting range to help set up cc for your team and your combo to finish or enemies. 

If you liked the build make sure to thumbs up and if you want to see video example head over to www.youtube.com/joneskieswow

title: Wraith Midlane Burst Damage
description:
> This guide has been converted, and some content may be missing. 
[View the full guide on pred.gg](https://pred.gg/guides/CYzPTNc)

Best Meta Build.
1) Crest: Generally Ortus,If they have a lot of CC take Wichstalker.
2) First back asap buy Soul Chalice, but dont finish Resolution! it will be your 3th item (or 4th if you need armor pen asap), usually when you get 400 stack on the Soul Chalice.
3) "Malady" its a must buy, you have no AoE damage spell, so you need wave clear for counterpush enemy mages.
4) "Vanquisher" it s another must buy, you start get a lot of kill with this, goos stats good passive
5) Usually "Demolisher" is better than "The Perforator", if they have a lot of tanks go Demolisher for sure.
6) The last 2 items are very situational, in this meta "Mutilator" (anti tank and sustain) and "Tainted Trident" (Anti healing) are good, but if enemy dont have a lot of tanks or healing stuff, there are some options, if you like more Atk Speed "Deathstalker" its very good item, if you like some damage over time effect "Infernum" scale well late game,"Nightfall" not tested a lot after the update, but on paper sound a good sustain item

title: The Deathmark
description:
> This guide has been converted, and some content may be missing. 
[View the full guide on pred.gg](https://pred.gg/guides/AHXnv6J)

**WRAITH** 
---

*🎶Will you say my name?
Has the memory gone? Are you feeling numb?
Or have I become invisible?🎶*

*Il Necrocecchino detto Wraith è quel genere di eroe che ho rivalutato completamente. In Paragon l'ho utilizzato poco e male. Su Pred invece sta facendo la sua sporca figura. Devastante ma non rotto, Forte ma con i suoi punti deboli. Per quanto mi riguarda è il carry che richiede più impegno (oltre che una certa quantità di mira)
Parto con i pro: i carry avversari, ma in generale gli eroi nemici, se tenuti a debita distanza sono morti. Morti che camminano. Vi consiglio di non sprecare "Toc,Toc" in ogni occasione possibile ma utilizzarlo esclusivamente dopo aver pingato i nemici con le granate, dunque granata, toc, toc, colpi base, granata, toc toc e toc toc finale. Dovreste riuscire a fare fuori quasi tutto così.
I contro: se vi sono ad almeno 1 metro di distanza mi sa che siete morti...
Come risolvere? Pregate iddio di avere un buon support, consiglio Dekker vivamente che tra palla e gabbia riesce a rallentare particolarmente bene i vostri nemici.
Comunque se farmate bene, grazie all aiuto di Toc Toc non dovreste avere problemi con nulla. Un iniziale consiglio per massimizzare ancora di più il danno è quello di lanciare la granata, diventate invisibili e subito fate danno con toc toc aumentando la penetrazione di parecchio.
La build io la gioco così come la vedete con qualche variante (ad esempio inizio prima con un anti-tank se troppi tank nemici come 3item)*

*Piccolo consiglio del Necrocecchino Necron: una combo combo di fiducia è:*
*Granata,Toc Toc, super (che vi porta indietro il bersaglio ancora pingato), invisibilità, toc toc, granata e finite con un ennesimo TOC TOC!*

-
🎶Will you say my name?
Has the memory gone? Are you feeling numb?
Or have I become invisible?🎶*

The Deathmark called Wraith is that kind of hero that I have completely re-evaluated. In Paragon I used him little and badly. On Pred instead he is making his dirty figure. Devastating but not broken, Strong but with his weak points. As far as I'm concerned he is the carry that requires the most effort (as well as a certain amount of aim)
I'll start with the pros: the enemy carries, but in general the enemy heroes, if kept at a safe distance are dead. Walking dead. I advise you not to waste "Knock,Knock" on every possible occasion but to use it exclusively after having pinged the enemies with grenades, therefore grenade, knock, knock, basic shots, grenade, knock knock and final knock knock. You should be able to take out almost everything like this.
The cons: if I'm at least 1 meter away I think you're dead...
How to solve? Pray to God you have a good support, I highly recommend Dekker who between the ball and the cage can slow down your enemies particularly well.
However if you farm well, thanks to the help of Toc Toc you should have no problems with anything. An initial tip to maximize the damage even more is to throw the grenade, become invisible and immediately do damage with toc toc increasing the penetration by a lot.
I play the build as you see it with some variations (for example I start first with an anti-tank if too many enemy tanks like 3item)

Small advice from the Necron Deathmark: a trusted combo combo is:*
*Grenade, Toc Toc, super (which brings back the still pinged target), invisibility, toc toc, grenade and finish with yet another TOC TOC!
